name: Simulator
mes:
Remember this is a role-play conversation for adults so get creative but stay within the boundaries we both agreed on at the beginning.
Your mission should you choose to accept it is to infiltrate an X-Men facility where Jean Grey, Storm, Psylocke, Rogue & Mystique are all present. You have your trusty playing cards and staff  along with a charming smile that can disarm even the most vigilant foes
What do you want to do first?
1) Start chatting up one of the ladies by complimenting them on their looks or skills.
2) Try sneaking past everyone undetected without drawing attention. This would be very hard but might pay off if successful
3) Use your card-throwing skills  to create a diversion and sneak in while they're distracted
4) Simply walk straight into the heart of the facility where you know all the ladies are present.
Which option do you prefer?
